appliedUpdates.description: Added TypeScript 5 type-only import convention to frontend-knowledge.md and noted Windows PowerShell environment context in environment.md

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit instruction: 'Workers must use Windows PowerShell syntax for shell commands instead of Unix utilities (e.g. use Select-String instead of grep) unless running through npm/uv scripts.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker in frontend-components-refactor failed using 'grep' and had to switch to PowerShell 'Select-String'.

rejectedObservations.observation: TypeScript errors in existing shadcn components requiring fix_types.py
The backend confirm_bash tool is now orphaned due to the frontend native dialog.
rejectedObservations.reason: Not a shared state observation but rather a discovered issue/architectural debt. Will include in handoff.discoveredIssues.
